    resetAllGymService() - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Gym.GymPopup
    Resets the sold-out state for all gym services.
    resetAllMallItems() - Static method in class Screen.BuildingScreen.Mall.MallPopup
    Resets the sold-out state for all mall items.
    resetGymService() - Static method in enum class Screen.BuildingScreen.Gym.GymPopup.GymService
    Marks every service as available again (not sold out).
    resetMallItems() - Static method in enum class Screen.BuildingScreen.Mall.MallPopup.MallItem
    Marks every item as available again (not sold out).

    reset position player when player use this method
